name: Uri (Switzerland)
description: A square yellow field charged with a black bull's head shown facing the viewer, with red tongue and a red nose-ring.
history: The Uri bull is canting arms (Urus/Stier) originating in the 13th century; the banner was carried at the battles of Morgarten (1315) and Laupen (1339).

features.role: bull's head caboshed, langued and nose-ringed red
